name: skill-flashcards
description: SourCards agent skills for spaced-repetition flashcards: formulate, lint, and import cards via the SourCards API.

interface.shortDescription: Flashcard formulation, lint, and import skills
interface.longDescription: SourCards plugin pack for outer agents. Ships the sourcards-flashcards import skill (and room for more): formulate atomic FSRS-ready cards, lint JSON, and import or roll back via the SourCards API. Separate from the in-app Learning Coach runtime.
defaultPrompt: Make flashcards from this note and lint before import
Lint this cards.json against SourCards rules
Import these cards into SourCards via the API
